error_signature: production URL shows port in webhook
title: Production webhook URL incorrectly shows port
symptom: In production, the webhook URL displays with a port number (e.g., :5678), while in test mode it does not. This can cause confusion and potential issues with webhook calls.
not_this_if: The URL works correctly without the port when accessed
root_cause: The issue arises from incorrect configuration of the N8N_WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL environment variables, which may include a trailing slash. This can lead to the production URL displaying the internal port number instead of the expected format.
fix_steps: Remove the trailing slash from the N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL and N8N_WEBHOOK_URL environment variables.
Set N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL to 'https://mydomain.com' and N8N_WEBHOOK_URL to 'https://mydomain.com'.
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the environment variables for the webhook and editor URLs and restart the n8n service.
